provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
These Regulations may be cited as the Telecommunications Regulations.

provisions.title: Interpretation

provisions.chapter: PART II Telecommunication Networks and Services (regs 3-16)
provisions.title: General obligation

definitions.definition: a part of the address plan's total address resource
either direct connection by wired, radio optical or other electromagnetic means, to the termination point of a telecommunication system, or the interworking point of such a system
a service provider as defined under section 2 of the Act, and shall include a telecommunication system operator
a part of the numbering plan's total number resource.
